name: Delivery Fee
description:
“Ugh… this was not a part of the job description…”

[“Tipping” Service]

.

—

You heard of stories where lucky delivery people get “tipped” for their great service. It’s one extra way to make money indeed, and it’s one that brings pleasure and is easy enough for Davan to do. Well, if he’s strong enough, that is. He’s been laid before, but will you do it differently with him? And, more importantly, how much will you tip?
